message:
feat(runtime): expand VOI sampling integration across widgets

schedule_trace.rs:
- Add snapshot sampling summary export
- Include violation count tracking in trace

virtual_terminal.rs:
- Improve resize handling with better bounds checking
- Add comments for edge case behavior

scrollbar.rs:
- Add debug assertions for position bounds
- Improve wide character handling

virtualized.rs:
- Add overscan documentation
- Clarify scroll offset calculations

app.rs:
- Wire VOI sampler summary to Evidence Ledger display

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
